info.name: ServiceNow Change Management API
info.description:
The ServiceNow Change Management API provides REST endpoints for creating, retrieving, updating, and managing change requests and their associated tasks and approvals. It supports the full change lifecycle including normal, standard, and emergency change types within the ITSM Change Management application.

Contact Support:
 Name: ServiceNow Support

item.name: Servicenow Create a Standard Change From a Template

variable.description: (Required) The sys_id of the standard change template to use for creating the change request.

request.description: Creates a new standard change request based on a pre-approved standard change template. The template sys_id determines the default values and pre-configured approvals.
